title: Extend key management for OSCORE group keys and per-peer E2E (TOFU/DANE updates)
description: Update lichen-client, firmware coap_keys, and key storage to support OSCORE master secrets derived from peer keys for dead drops and group keys for confessions. Support trust levels for group contexts.
close_reason: Created as child of 2h1i.2.8 to scope key management updates for TOFU/DANE + OSCORE group/per-peer keys
